title: raw performance
description: The greatest FPS boosting pack that has ever been seen on Modrinth!
body:
**raw performance ⚡ | Max FPS, No Compromises!**  

🚀 **Supercharge Your FPS** – Say goodbye to lag and hello to buttery-smooth gameplay! *raw performance* is the ultimate modpack designed to squeeze every last frame out of your system.  

🛠 **Optimized to the Core** – Featuring the best performance mods, fine-tuned settings, and zero bloat. Every tweak is hand-picked to ensure your game runs **faster, smoother, and more responsive** than ever before.  

🎯 **Built for Every Setup** – Whether you're on a high-end rig or a potato PC, *raw performance* gives you the **best possible experience** with minimal resource usage.  

🔥 **No Gimmicks, Just Pure FPS** – No unnecessary extras, no distractions—just raw, unfiltered performance at its finest. Install it, launch Minecraft, and **feel the difference instantly!**  

🔧 **Includes:** Vulkan, Lithium, Starlight, FerriteCore & more essential performance boosters!  

💨 Download now & unlock your PC’s true potential! 🏎💨
